privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openc3_cosmos_env command_boundary_enforcement_audit task by confirming that the task operates on a synthetically configured OpenC3 COSMOS environment. Verified that the expected target ('INST') and command ('COLLECT'), along with the expected output file ('/home/ga/Desktop/boundary_audit.json'), explicitly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and export_result.sh queries.
